nodes.label: Build script main
nodes.rationale: Probes libinput >= 1.30.0 via pkg-config to conditionally set have_libinput_plugin_system cfg flag.

nodes.label: Animations config
nodes.rationale: Animation properties are fairly tied together, except maybe off. Therefore merge_with does not merge within individual animations.

nodes.label: IPC Action mapping to config Action
nodes.norm_label: ipc action mapping to config action

nodes.label: Key trigger with modifier parsing
nodes.rationale: The keyboard event handling code can receive either XF86ScreenSaver or XF86Screensaver because there is no case mapping defined between these keysyms. The case-insensitive match prefers the lowercase version, so a further case-sensitive match is attempted to allow binding either keysym.

nodes.label: MergeWith partial config pattern
nodes.rationale: Each config struct has a corresponding *Part struct with Option fields. The *Part can be merged into the full struct to support partial config updates and window rules.

nodes.label: Knuffel manual Decode implementations
nodes.rationale: Many config types implement knuffel::Decode manually rather than deriving, to support dual-form parsing, custom validation, or specialized argument handling.

nodes.label: Smithay delegate macro pattern for Wayland protocols
nodes.norm_label: smithay delegate macro pattern for wayland protocols

nodes.label: Protocol refresh synchronises compositor state with Wayland clients
nodes.norm_label: protocol refresh synchronises compositor state with wayland clients

nodes.label: Virtual input backend translating Wayland requests to input events
nodes.norm_label: virtual input backend translating wayland requests to input events

nodes.label: Per-surface background effect with blur and xray
nodes.norm_label: per-surface background effect with blur and xray

nodes.label: HDR image description construction from output properties
nodes.norm_label: hdr image description construction from output properties

nodes.name: ScreenTransition
nodes.doc_comment: Texture to crossfade from for each render target.

nodes.name: ScreenshotUi
nodes.doc_comment: Ideally the screenshot UI should support cross-output selections...

nodes.name: MoveState
nodes.doc_comment: State for moving the selection (as opposed to just drawing).

nodes.name: Inner
nodes.doc_comment: State of an opened MRU UI.

nodes.name: PREVIEW_MIN_SIZE
nodes.doc_comment: Windows up to this size don't get scaled further down.

nodes.name: BORDER
nodes.doc_comment: Border width on the selected window preview.

nodes.name: TITLE_GAP
nodes.doc_comment: Gap from the window preview to the window title.

nodes.name: STRUT
nodes.doc_comment: How much of the next window will always peek from the side of the screen.

nodes.name: PANEL_PADDING
nodes.doc_comment: Padding in the scope indication panel.

nodes.name: PANEL_BORDER
nodes.doc_comment: Border size of the scope indication panel.

nodes.name: FONT
nodes.doc_comment: Font used to render the window titles.

nodes.name: SCOPE_CYCLE
nodes.doc_comment: Scopes in the order they are cycled through.

nodes.name: make_preset_opened_binds
nodes.doc_comment: Returns key bindings available when the MRU UI is open.

nodes.name: make_dynamic_opened_binds
nodes.doc_comment: Returns dynamic key bindings available when the MRU UI is open.
